summary: Comprehensive testing of Payment Types CRUD and expanded Client form features. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%) - Payment Types CRUD, seed-defaults, and Client expanded fields all working. Frontend: All features verified with one bug fixed - Pagamento tab dropdown was causing runtime error due to empty string value in SelectItem.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty string value causing runtime error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
ui_bugs.status: FIXED - Changed value='' to value='__none__' with handler conversion

payment_types_crud.GET /api/payment-types/: PASS - Returns list with items[] and total
payment_types_crud.POST /api/payment-types/: PASS - Creates payment type with installment flags

seed_defaults.POST /api/payment-types/seed-defaults: PASS - Seeds 11 default Italian payment types
seed_defaults.idempotent: PASS - Returns seeded=0 if types already exist

expanded_client_fields.client_type values: PASS - cliente, fornitore, cliente_fornitore all work

frontend_payment_types_page.table_with_installment_grid: PASS - 20 columns showing checkboxes for each installment

frontend_clients_page.5_tabs: PASS - Anagrafica, Indirizzo, Contatti, Pagamento, Note all present

contatti_tab.contact_dialog: PASS - Type selector, document email preferences checkboxes

frontend_clients_page.pagamento_tab: PASS (AFTER FIX) - select-payment-type dropdown populated with payment types
frontend_clients_page.table_columns: PASS - Tipo badge and Pagamento column visible

critical_code_review_comments: Payment types installment grid is well designed with 15 schedule flags
Client model backward compatibility maintained with legacy client_type values
Contacts array properly supports document email preferences (preventivi, fatture, solleciti, ordini, ddt)
All new UI components have proper data-testid attributes
test_credentials: Created test users via MongoDB (test-pt-module-*, test-ui-pt-*), all cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Payment types seeded via /api/payment-types/seed-defaults, test clients created and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment Types CRUD and expanded Client form fully tested. Key features: 1) Tipi Pagamento page at /impostazioni/pagamenti with CRUD table showing installment checkbox grid (Imm, 30, 60, 90...360 gg, FM, IVA30). 2) Carica Predefiniti button seeds 11 standard Italian payment types. 3) Client form has 5 tabs: Anagrafica (with Tipo Cliente/Fornitore/Cliente-Fornitore, Persona Fisica toggle), Indirizzo, Contatti (with Persone di Riferimento sub-table), Pagamento (dropdown linked to payment types CRUD), Note. 4) Client list table shows Tipo badge and Pagamento column. 5) BUG FIXED: SelectItem in Pagamento tab was using empty string value - changed to '__none__' placeholder.
rca_of_the_issue: The Radix UI Select component does not allow empty string as SelectItem value. The fix was to use a placeholder value '__none__' and convert it to empty string in the onChange handler.
